EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Rejected Certificate
EmailTemplate.subject: You need to update one of your documents
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName} ,
The {!b3o__Certificate__c.b3o__Certificate_Type__c} certificate has been rejected due to {!b3o__Certificate__c.Rejection_Reason__c}.
Please follow the link below to upload a new certificate and proceed with your application.
UPLOAD A NEW CERTIFICATE
If you have any questions, feel free to give us a call on 07 4998 5550— we're always happy to help.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
